short_description: Column count or value count mismatch on INSERT
notes: Source schema changed but target unchanged - common with parquet loaders
Loader runs before lake file lands - timing race
Temp table missing - usually session reuse / re-entry issue
Same race as 404 - landing zone empty when loader runs
Dirty data in source - cell content does not match declared type
Loader retries that did not clean up - LP_* prefixes are LP recon stage tables
Manual cancels - probably aborted ad-hoc queries
Diagnostic query from an external tool

short_description: Transaction has failed - no corresponding transaction found
notes: Synapse Dedicated forbids DDL in transactions
